ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "self_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the call entry */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the parent department or unit */,
  "from_parent_count" INTEGER /* Total number of calls received from the parent unit */,
  "from_parent_calls" INTEGER /* Number of successful calls from the parent unit */,
  "from_parent_paths" INTEGER /* Count of distinct paths the calls took */,
  "pct" REAL /* Percentage of successful calls out of total calls */,
  "call_start_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the call was initiated */,
  "call_end_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the call was completed */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_status" TEXT /* The status of the call (e.g., completed, missed, in progress) */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* The type of call (e.g., inbound, outbound, internal) */,
  "call_initiator" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who initiated the call */,
  "call_recipient" INTEGER /* The user ID of the person who received the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("self_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_initiator FOREIGN KEY ("call_initiator") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_recipient FOREIGN KEY ("call_recipient") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the parent department (if applicable) */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* The physical location of the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* The primary phone number of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* The primary email address of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* The user ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the metrics belong to */,
  "total_calls" INTEGER /* Total number of calls handled by the department */,
  "successful_calls" INTEGER /* Total number of successful calls */,
  "call_success_rate" REAL /* Rate of successful calls represented as a percentage */,
  "average_call_duration" INTEGER /* The average duration of calls in seconds */,
  "longest_call_duration" INTEGER /* The longest duration of a call in seconds */,
  "shortest_call_duration" INTEGER /* The shortest duration of a call in seconds */,
  "average_wait_time" INTEGER /* The average wait time before a call is answered in seconds */,
  "total_wait_time" INTEGER /* The total wait time for all calls in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_metrics_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each path step */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the call entry */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the step in the path */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the department that handled the call at this step */,
  "transfer_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the call was transferred to the next department */,
  "transfer_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the transfer in seconds */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the transfer (e.g., escalation, specialization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_paths_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_paths_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("self_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* The primary phone number of the user */,
  "user_extension" TEXT /* The extension number of the user */,
  "user_join_date" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the organization */,
  "user_leave_date" TEXT /* The date when the user left the organization (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
